questionsAnswered: RQ1 — Context Budget Engine (deepening) with four patch-ready artifacts: per-model defaults table, truncation-marker syntax, eviction priority ladder, sk-prompt integration point

description: 8-row table (SWE-1.6, DeepSeek-v4-pro, Kimi-k2.6, Qwen3.6, GLM-5.1, gpt-5.5, Opus, Sonnet) with columns: context_window, max_budget_pct, working_memory_tokens, summary_threshold, notes. Fixed 70% max_budget_pct across all models; working_memory and summary_threshold scaled by context window tier (8k→500/200, 32k→1000/300, 128k→2000/500, 200k→3000/600). Integration target: cli-devin/references/context-budget.md (new file).

Two syntax candidates: Candidate A (recommended) adopts smallcode verbatim '[... truncated ${deficit} tokens to fit context budget]' for self-documenting clarity and consistency; Candidate B is compact variant '[... ${deficit} tokens truncated — budget limit]' for high-frequency truncation scenarios. Rationale favors Candidate A for explicitness and negligible token overhead. Integration target: cli-devin/references/truncation-strategy.md (new file).

Mapping from smallcode's two-tier eviction (Priority 1: tool_results full eviction, Priority 2: conversation 50% rate) to our agent-config-iter recipe structure with three tiers: Tier 1 tool_results (1.0 rate), Tier 2 conversation (0.5 rate), Tier 3 working_memory (0.25 rate extension), protected categories [system_prompt], event emission true. Integration target: add context_budget.eviction_priority section to all agent-config-iter JSON files and document in cli-opencode/references/context-eviction.md (new file).

Exact insertion point: new subsection 'Composition guidance: budget awareness' after line 50 (after anti-hallucination wording paragraph), before line 52 (before CLEAR checklist header). Proposed content covers token-budget estimation, context prioritization, truncation marker usage, and summarization thresholds with per-model references. Integration target: edit cli_prompt_quality_card.md and sync to mirror files per existing mirror sync contract.
